title: Séries Longas para a Economia Portuguesa — Pós II Guerra Mundial (Long Series for the Portuguese Economy — Post WWII)
time_coverage: post-WWII (late 1940s) through recent years, long-run annual series
license_terms: Banco de Portugal public statistics, free reuse with attribution
notes: Banco de Portugal's own PDF compilation of long-run economic series for Portugal since WWII (companion/predecessor to the joint INE/BdP 'Séries Longas para a Economia Portuguesa 2020' downloaded under ine-portugal — see data/raw/ine-portugal/long-series-portuguese-economy/). Direct PDF download from bportugal.pt document library, no login required.
